title: Exline's Wool to String
description: This mod allows you to craft string from any color of wool. Carpets can also be recycled for a little string now. For use on servers, this must be installed on both server and all clients.
body:
# Exline's Wool to String Mod

Revamp your crafting routine with the Exline's Wool to String mod!

Are you tired of surplus wool and carpets cluttering your inventory? This mod introduces new crafting recipes that let you transform any color of wool and unwanted carpets into valuable string. It's a practical way to recycle materials and enhance your resource management in Minecraft.

![recipe for string](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m7fbbMbo/images/355869dcb53aa36adb0e1fe9c919c9a68e02b174.gif)

## Features:

- Efficient Recycling: Convert any color of wool and carpets into string.
  
- Resource Management: Free up inventory space by repurposing excess materials.
  
- Seamless Integration: Crafting recipes fit naturally within the vanilla Minecraft experience.

Download Exline's Wool to String and streamline your crafting today!
## Compatibility:

Exline's Wool-to-String mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21.5)
- [1.21.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21.4)
- [1.21.2-1.21.3](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21.3)
- [1.21](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21)
- [1.20 - 1.20.6](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.20.6&g=1.20.5&g=1.20.4&g=1.20.3&g=1.20.2&g=1.20.1&g=1.20)
- [1.19.3](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.19.3)
- [1.16.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.16.5)
- [1.15.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.15.2)
- [1.14.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=fabric&g=1.14.4)

These versions for Forge:
- [1.21](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=forge&g=1.21)
- [1.20-1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=forge&g=1.20&g=1.20.1&g=1.20.2&g=1.20.3&g=1.20.4)
- [1.19-1.19.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=forge&g=1.19.4&g=1.19.3&g=1.19.2&g=1.19.1&g=1.19)

These versions for NeoForge:
- [1.20.2, 1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=neoforge)

These versions for Quilt:
- [1.20, 1.20.1, 1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/exlines-wool-to-string/versions?l=quilt)

# Explore More at ExlineMods!

Thank you for using our mods! For the best experience, visit our official website, [Exline Mods](https://exlinemods.com/).
Why Visit Our Website?

- Early Updates: Get the latest updates faster than other sites.

- Crafting Recipes: Find detailed crafting recipes for our mods.
- Join the Community: Connect with fellow modders and get support via our Discord server.

Get Started!

Visit [Exline Mods](https://exlinemods.com/) now and [join our Discord Server](https://discord.gg/9UVGJGyqbv) to be part of our community. We look forward to seeing you there!
